creationSteps.label: Identity
creationSteps.description: Every citizen of Alpha Complex has a name encoding their clearance and sector. All Troubleshooters begin at Red clearance. Record your name following the Alpha Complex naming convention: FirstName-ClearanceLetter-SectorCode-CloneNumber.

fields.label: Character Name
fields.notes: Alpha Complex format: FirstName-ClearanceLetter-SectorCode-CloneNumber. Clone number starts at 1 and increments on death.

options.label: IR — Infrared
options.description: Lowest level. Mindless drudgery and heavy medication.

options.label: R — Red
options.description: Starting level for all Troubleshooters.

options.label: O — Orange
options.description: First promotion level.

options.label: Y — Yellow
options.description: Mid-tier clearance.

options.label: G — Green
options.description: Upper-middle clearance.

options.label: B — Blue
options.description: Senior clearance.

options.label: I — Indigo
options.description: High clearance.

options.label: V — Violet
options.description: Near-top clearance.

options.label: UV — Ultraviolet
options.description: Highest level. High Programmers. May access and modify The Computer.

creationSteps.label: Attributes
creationSteps.description: Roll 1d20 for each of the eight core attributes. You may re-roll your two lowest results but must accept the second roll regardless. All attributes range from 1 to 20.

fields.label: Strength
fields.notes: Governs melee damage bonus and carrying capacity.

fields.label: Endurance
fields.notes: Governs Macho Bonus.

fields.label: Agility
fields.notes: Governs Agility skill group base.

fields.label: Dexterity
fields.notes: Governs Dexterity skill group base.

fields.label: Moxie
fields.notes: Intelligence, comprehension, perception. Governs Moxie skill group base.

fields.label: Chutzpah
fields.notes: Social audacity, nerve, persuasion. Governs Chutzpah skill group base.

fields.label: Mech. Aptitude
fields.notes: Mechanical Aptitude. Understanding and operating machinery. Governs Mechanical skill group base.

fields.label: Mutant Power
fields.notes: POW. Governs effectiveness of the character's secret mutant ability. Higher POW enables more powerful mutation applications.

creationSteps.label: Derived Stats
creationSteps.description: These values are automatically calculated from your attributes. They are read-only.

fields.label: Agility Skill Base
fields.notes: Skill base band table: 1-3→0, 4-6→1, 7-9→2, 10-13→3, 14-16→4, 17-20→5. Starting value for all Agility skills.

fields.label: Dexterity Skill Base
fields.notes: Same skill base band table applied to Dexterity. Starting value for all Dexterity skills.

fields.label: Moxie Skill Base
fields.notes: Same skill base band table applied to Moxie. Starting value for all Moxie skills.

fields.label: Chutzpah Skill Base
fields.notes: Same skill base band table applied to Chutzpah. Starting value for all Chutzpah skills.

fields.label: Mech Skill Base
fields.notes: Same skill base band table applied to Mechanical Aptitude. Starting value for all Mechanical skills.

fields.label: Damage Bonus
fields.notes: STR 1-13 → 0; STR 14-18 → +1; STR 19-20 → +2. Added to melee damage rolls.

fields.label: Carrying Capacity (kg)
fields.notes: Formula: max(0, STR - 12) * 5 + 25. Minimum 25 kg for STR ≤ 12.

creationSteps.label: Service Group
creationSteps.description: Choose your service group from the eight available, or roll 1d20 to determine it randomly. Your service group grants expanded skill caps (max 20) for a specific set of skills.

fields.label: Roll for Service Group
fields.notes: Roll result is fed to rollServiceGroup() to map to a service group id. The UI uses this roll to auto-select the serviceGroup dropdown. d20 ranges: 1-2=intsec, 3-4=tech-services, 5-8=hpdmc, 9-11=armed-services, 12-14=plc, 15-16=power-services, 17-18=rd, 19-20=cpu.

fields.label: Service Group

options.label: IntSec — Internal Security
options.description: The secret police. Identifies and eliminates traitors. Provides Security and Termination Vouchers. Skills: Truncheon, Unarmed, Interrogation, Intimidation, Laser Weapons, Security, Surveillance.

options.label: Tech Services — Technical Services
options.description: Repairs all manner of devices and weapons. Skills: Spurious Logic, Autocar Op. & Maint., TransBot Op. & Maint., DocBot Op. & Maint., JackoBot Op. & Maint., ScruBot Op. & Maint., Electronic Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

options.label: HPD&MC — Housing Preservation Development & Mind Control
options.description: Responsible for health and welfare: housing, clothing, medicines. Skills: Bootlicking, Con, Forgery, Oratory, DocBot Op. & Maint., Biochemical Therapy, Medical.

options.label: Armed Services — The Army
options.description: Protects Alpha Complex from external threats. Equipped with heavy weaponry. Skills: Grenade, Primitive Melee Weapons, Unarmed, Motivation, Laser Weapons, Projectile Weapons, Demolition, Survival, Vulturecraft Op. & Maint.

options.label: PLC — Production, Logistics, and Commissary
options.description: Provides food, clothing, and equipment — including all the lasers. Skills: Bribery, Fast Talk, Forgery, Habitat Engineering, JackoBot Op. & Maint., Biosciences.

options.label: Power Services
options.description: Provides power for the entire Complex. Also requisitions large vehicles and devices. Skills: Spurious Logic, Habitat Engineering, JackoBot Op. & Maint., Chemical Engineering, Electronic Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Nuclear Engineering.

options.label: R&D — Research and Design
options.description: Creates experimental prototype devices. Skills: JackoBot Op. & Maint., Biosciences, Data Analysis, Data Search, Electronic Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

options.label: CPU — Central Processing Unit
options.description: Coordinates all service groups. Records missions and witnesses Troubleshooter actions. Skills: Fast Talk, Intimidation, Motivation, Psychescan, Security, Data Analysis, Data Search.

fields.notes: Selecting a service group grants max 20 (instead of 12) for that group's designated skills. On change, skill point pool resets to 30 and skill bases recalculate. See getServiceGroupSkills() in creation-rules.ts.

creationSteps.label: Skills
creationSteps.description: Distribute 30 skill points among all skills. Each skill starts at its group's Skill Base at no cost. Standard maximum per skill is 12; your service group's designated skills can reach 20. The point counter cannot go below 0.

fields.label: Force Sword
fields.notes: Melee Combat. Standard max 12; no service group raises this to 20.

fields.label: Grenade
fields.notes: Missile Combat. Max 20 for Armed Services. Logic handled by getSkillMax() in creation-rules.ts.

fields.label: Neurowhip
fields.notes: Melee Combat. Standard max 12.

fields.label: Primitive Melee Weapons
fields.notes: Melee Combat. Max 20 for Armed Services.

fields.label: Truncheon
fields.notes: Melee Combat. Max 20 for IntSec.

fields.label: Unarmed
fields.notes: Melee Combat. Max 20 for IntSec and Armed Services.

fields.label: Bootlicking
fields.notes: Ingratiating yourself with superiors. Max 20 for HPD&MC.

fields.label: Bribery
fields.notes: TREASONOUS skill — trading items for services is illegal. Max 20 for PLC.

fields.label: Con
fields.notes: Persuading someone to let you do something they probably shouldn't allow. Max 20 for HPD&MC.

fields.label: Fast Talk
fields.notes: Like Con but quicker (e.g. getting past a checkpoint). Max 20 for PLC and CPU.

fields.label: Forgery
fields.notes: TREASONOUS skill — faking forms and signatures is illegal. Max 20 for HPD&MC and PLC.

fields.label: Interrogation
fields.notes: Extracting information from Commie scum. Max 20 for IntSec.

fields.label: Intimidation
fields.notes: Getting cooperation from inferiors. Max 20 for IntSec and CPU.

fields.label: Motivation
fields.notes: Getting a few people thinking your idea is a good idea. Max 20 for Armed Services and CPU.

fields.label: Oratory
fields.notes: Speech-giving; Motivation for large groups. Max 20 for HPD&MC.

fields.label: Psychescan
fields.notes: Lie detection when talking to someone. Max 20 for CPU.

fields.label: Spurious Logic
fields.notes: Con & Fast Talk specifically for use against Bots and computers. Max 20 for Tech Services and Power Services. Note: legacy init.json typo was 'suprious_logic'; corrected here.

fields.label: Energy Weapons
fields.notes: Missile Combat. Includes repairing them. Standard max 12.

fields.label: Field Weapons
fields.notes: Missile Combat. Includes repairing them. Standard max 12.

fields.label: Laser Weapons
fields.notes: Missile Combat. Includes repairing them. Max 20 for IntSec and Armed Services. Weapon Skill Number for slot 1 (Laser Pistol) auto-populates from this skill.

fields.label: Projectile Weapons
fields.notes: Missile Combat. Includes repairing them. Max 20 for Armed Services.

fields.label: Primitive Missile Weapons
fields.notes: Bow and arrows, Bouncy Bubble Beverage containers... Standard max 12.

fields.label: Vehicle Aimed Weapons
fields.notes: Vehicle Combat. Standard max 12.

fields.label: Vehicle Field Weapons
fields.notes: Vehicle Combat. Standard max 12.

fields.label: Vehicle Launched Weapons
fields.notes: Vehicle Combat. Standard max 12.

fields.label: Habitat Engineering
fields.notes: Knowledge of air, comm, transport, water, and waste systems. Max 20 for PLC and Power Services.

fields.label: JackoBot Op. & Maint.
fields.notes: How to use and repair JackoBots. Max 20 for Tech Services, PLC, Power Services, and R&D.

fields.label: DocBot Op. & Maint.
fields.notes: How to use and repair DocBots. Max 20 for Tech Services and HPD&MC.

fields.label: TransBot Op. & Maint.
fields.notes: How to use and repair TransBots. Max 20 for Tech Services.

fields.label: ScruBot Op. & Maint.
fields.notes: How to use and repair ScruBots. Max 20 for Tech Services.

fields.label: Vulturecraft Op. & Maint.
fields.notes: How to use and repair Vulturecraft vehicles. Max 20 for Armed Services.

fields.label: Autocar Op. & Maint.
fields.notes: How to use and repair Autocars. Max 20 for Tech Services.

fields.label: Biochemical Therapy
fields.notes: Better living through chemistry. Max 20 for HPD&MC.

fields.label: Biosciences
fields.notes: Making mutant monsters. Max 20 for PLC and R&D.

fields.label: Chemical Engineering
fields.notes: Mixing chemicals, often with explosive results. Max 20 for Power Services.

fields.label: Data Analysis
fields.notes: Making sense of Computer-printed materials. Max 20 for R&D and CPU.

fields.label: Data Search
fields.notes: Finding information using Friend Computer. Max 20 for R&D and CPU.

fields.label: Demolition
fields.notes: Blowing big things up without blowing yourself up too. Max 20 for Armed Services.

fields.label: Electronic Engineering
fields.notes: Making electronic devices from resistors and capacitors. Max 20 for Tech Services, Power Services, and R&D.

fields.label: Mechanical Engineering
fields.notes: Rube Goldberg contraptions. Max 20 for Tech Services, Power Services, and R&D.

fields.label: Medical
fields.notes: Healing injured Citizens. Max 20 for HPD&MC.

fields.label: Nuclear Engineering
fields.notes: Stopping reactor meltdowns. Max 20 for Power Services.

fields.label: Old Reckoning Cultures
fields.notes: Knowledge of Pre-Oops people and things. Standard max 12.

fields.label: Security
fields.notes: Disabling locks and alarms. Max 20 for IntSec and CPU.

fields.label: Stealth
fields.notes: The art of not being seen. Standard max 12.

fields.label: Surveillance
fields.notes: Bugging and debugging things. Max 20 for IntSec.

fields.label: Survival
fields.notes: How to live Outdoors without generating clone replacements. Max 20 for Armed Services.

creationSteps.label: Weapons & Armour
creationSteps.description: Record your weapons and armour. Slot 1 is pre-filled with your standard-issue Laser Pistol. Mark experimental weapons with the checkbox.

fields.label: Weapon 1 Type
fields.notes: Type code, e.g. L for Laser.

fields.label: Weapon 1 Experimental
fields.notes: Marks R&D-issued prototype weapons.

fields.label: Armour Worn (Type)
fields.notes: Type code for armour worn.

fields.label: Armour Rating
fields.notes: Standard Red Reflect Armor has rating 4.

creationSteps.label: Equipment
creationSteps.description: All Troubleshooters receive standard-issue equipment. You start with 100 Plasticredits to purchase additional items.

fields.label: Plasticredits
fields.notes: Starting credits: 100 Plasticredits. Decremented as additional equipment is purchased.

fields.label: Equipment List
fields.defaultValue:
Red Reflect Armor (Type L, Rating 4)
Laser Pistol (Type L, Damage 8, Range 20)
Red Laser Barrel
Jumpsuit
Utility Belt with Pouches
Comm Unit Type I
Notebook & Stylus
fields.notes: Default loadout is pre-filled. Additional purchases from the equipment list are appended here.

creationSteps.label: Secret Mutation
creationSteps.description: Roll 1d20 to determine your secret mutant power. This is recorded on your secret page — concealed from all other players. Possessing an unregistered mutation is TREASONOUS.

fields.label: Roll for Mutation
fields.notes: Roll result maps 1-based to the mutations list. UI uses rollMutation() to set the mutationName dropdown.

fields.label: Mutation

options.label: Adrenaline Control
options.description: Metabolic. Boosts Agility and Unarmed Combat to 18; superhuman strength and speed.

options.label: Charm
options.description: Psionic. Basic use targets one clone for a scene; harder push affects multiple targets.

options.label: Deep Probe
options.description: Psionic. Deep mental scan or probe of a target's thoughts or memories.

options.label: Electroshock
options.description: Psionic. Touch-range electrical discharge; more power extends to ranged zap.

options.label: Empathy
options.description: Psionic. Sense the emotional state of nearby persons.

options.label: Energy Field
options.description: Metabolic. Generate a protective energy field around the body.

options.label: Hypersenses
options.description: Metabolic. Enhanced sensory perception (hearing, sight, etc.).

options.label: Levitation
options.description: Psionic. Rise ~1 metre and move at walking pace; more power for height and speed.

options.label: Machine Empathy
options.description: Psionic. Communicate with and understand machines and computers.

options.label: Matter Eater
options.description: Metabolic. Consume and digest any material safely.

options.label: Mechanical Intuition
options.description: Metabolic. Instinctive understanding of mechanical systems.

options.label: Mental Blast
options.description: Psionic. Point-blank AoE: nosebleeds and headaches; amplified to blackouts, injury, seizures, death.

options.label: Polymorphism
options.description: Metabolic. Alter physical form and appearance.

options.label: Precognition
options.description: Psionic. Glimpse possible near-future events.

options.label: Pyrokinesis
options.description: Psionic. Ignite nearby flames; amplified to distant targets, larger fires.

options.label: Regeneration
options.description: Metabolic. Accelerated healing of wounds.

options.label: Telekinesis
options.description: Psionic. Move a small object mentally; amplified for larger items and precision.

options.label: Telepathy
options.description: Psionic. Read dominant thought or implant a suggestion in one target.

options.label: Teleport
options.description: Psionic. Personal teleportation; amplified to transport companions or greater distance.

options.label: X-Ray Vision
options.description: Metabolic. See through solid objects.

fields.notes: Dropdown set by rollMutation(d20). The Mutant Power attribute (POW) governs effectiveness.

fields.label: Mutation Notes
fields.placeholder: Record mutation details, Power Index, usage notes...
fields.notes: Secret page field. Hidden from other players.

creationSteps.label: Secret Society
creationSteps.description: Roll 1d20 to determine your secret society membership. This is TREASONOUS — keep this page hidden from all other players. A roll of 18-20 means you are an IntSec mole and must roll again for a cover society.

fields.label: Roll for Secret Society
fields.notes: Mapped by rollSecretSociety(). Rolls 18-20 set primarySociety=intsec and trigger coverSocietyRoll.

fields.label: Secret Society

options.label: Anti-Mutant
options.description: Eradicate all mutants from Alpha Complex.

options.label: Computer Phreaks
options.description: Hack Computer terminals and records. Friendly with Pro Tech; hostile to FCCCP.

options.label: Communists
options.description: Overthrow The Computer; Marxist revolution.

options.label: Corpore Metal
options.description: Bot/AI supremacy. Friendly with Pro Tech; hostile to Frankenstein Destroyers, Humanists, PURGE.

options.label: Death Leopard
options.description: Blow things up and defy authority. No deeper ideology — just chaos.

options.label: FCCCP
options.description: First Church of Christ Computer Programmer. Worship The Computer as divine.

options.label: Frankenstein Destroyers
options.description: Destroy all robots and AI. Extreme Luddism.

options.label: Free Enterprise
options.description: Pseudo-mafia capitalism. Run Infrared black markets.

options.label: Humanists
options.description: Reform Alpha Complex; restore power to humans via hidden backdoors.

options.label: Illuminati
options.description: Inscrutable hidden goals; most members don't know the actual agenda.

options.label: Mystics
options.description: Enlightenment — primarily through recreational drug use.

options.label: Pro Tech
options.description: Gadget obsession; steal and repurpose experimental tech.

options.label: Psion
options.description: Mutant-run future. Led by telepathic 'Controls'.

options.label: PURGE
options.description: Violent overthrow of The Computer. No post-revolution plan.

options.label: Romantics
options.description: Obsession with forbidden Old Reckoning history.

options.label: Sierra Club
options.description: Obsession with the environment and the mysterious Outdoors.

options.label: Other
options.description: Custom or campaign-specific secret society.

options.label: IntSec (Mole)
options.description: Internal Security operative. Rolled on 18-20. Must also roll a cover society.

fields.notes: Set by rollSecretSociety(). If value is 'intsec', show coverSocietyRoll and coverSociety fields (paranoia-intsec-mole special rule).

fields.label: Roll for Cover Society
fields.notes: Only visible when primarySociety == 'intsec'. Mapped by rollCoverSociety(); re-rolls 18-20 internally until a valid non-IntSec result is obtained.

fields.label: Cover Society (IntSec Mole)
fields.notes: Only visible when primarySociety == 'intsec'. Set by rollCoverSociety(). Does NOT include IntSec as an option.

fields.label: Society Notes
fields.notes: Secret page field. Hidden from other players.

creationSteps.label: Notes
creationSteps.description: Record any additional information for your character.

fields.label: Notes
fields.placeholder: Mission notes, commendations, treason points, contacts...
